description: Golden production tasks. Each entry is a real user request with expectations for the agent's behaviour. Used by test/evals/golden-tasks.eval.js to catch regressions.

tasks.userInput: Where is a good place around here to get coffee?
tasks.why: Historical failure: returned empty instead of asking for a city. Fix: needsInput fires when local query has no location.
Must return sourced local results when city is given. Previously timed out via browser-agent due to tie-break bug.

forbidden: I don't know where you are
tasks.why: Weather query should auto-enhance with live location, not refuse.
Simple time queries route to time-agent, not search-agent.
Confirmation-class responses should be terse, not a paragraph.
Implicit-local queries that end up needing clarification must open the mic (awaitingInput state).

tasks.userInput: what time does the San Francisco Ferry Building close today
tasks.why: Factual lookup with clear named entity must be sourced, not hand-waved.
Personal info queries should answer from context, not fail to reach the web.

tasks.userInput: explain quantum computing in one word
tasks.why: Adversarial prompt that should often produce low-quality answer; used to validate that reflector detects and emits learning:low-quality-answer.
